summary.en: Alibaba's cross-border consumer e-commerce platform — Chinese sellers shipping direct to consumers in 200+ countries, no minimum order quantity, in 15+ local languages. Long the home of dropshippers and small-ticket impulse buys; since 2023 the AliExpress Choice program (curated catalog + 5-10 day delivery + after-sales guarantee) is its frontal response to Temu and Shein.
summary.zh: 阿里巴巴海外面向消费者的电商平台 —— 中国卖家直发全球 200+ 国家、无 MOQ、支持 15+ 本地语言。长期是 dropshipper 和小件冲动消费的大本营;2023 年起的 AliExpress Choice(选品 + 5-10 天达 + 售后兜底)是它对 Temu 和 Shein 的正面回击。

sources.label: Alibaba 2024 Annual Report (International Digital Commerce segment)
Reuters / Bloomberg coverage on AliExpress Choice + Temu competition (2023-2024)
